days.summary: Runway expanded from model provider to platform builder with three named launches: Runway Builders, Runway Characters, and Runway Fund, signaling a broader push into creator tooling and ecosystem development. ByteDance Seed also shipped two concrete model artifacts — Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM — adding both preview reasoning capacity and real-time speech interaction. Zhipu, now listed in Hong Kong as 02513.HK, published its first earnings report and said it will release full-year 2025 results on March 31, 2026, giving investors a new public-market data point on a major Chinese AI company.
